case_title: PROJECT MANAGEMENT ASSOCIATES INC. VS A+A MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PROJECT MANAGEMENT ASSOCIATES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT A+A MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
